title: Broadcast multicast RPL control at L2
description: Use broadcast/elided L2 destination for any IPv6 multicast RPL destination while retaining IID-to-EUI mapping for unicast.
acceptance_criteria: Parsed-wire DIO and DIS tests show multicast uses broadcast/elided addressing, unicast remains addressed, and receive behavior succeeds.
close_reason: Centralized IPv6-to-L2 destination selection: multicast uses broadcast/no-destination and unicast derives EUI-64; receive filter accepts multicast. Added parsed DIO/DIS/unicast wire assertions and multicast DIO/DIS receive-response test.
